title: Parallel architecture search — hitting the 83-disrupted ceiling

extra_feature_tracks.E_pairwise: 10 features — signal pair products and ratios

why_parallel_doesnt_help: Adding features (63→113) adds noise, not signal
Stacking (GBT+RF) doesn't improve — models agree on the same easy/hard cases
The information is already captured by 63 physics features
what_would_actually_improve: MORE DISRUPTED SHOTS (ops-log: potentially 448 → 5x more data)
DIFFERENT MACHINE data (C-Mod full, DIII-D via MDSplus)
TIMEPOINT-LEVEL prediction (like CCNN) instead of shot-level
